title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 2, Section D, Topics 11-15:  Chapter 33 Processing Screens in DGI
description: Section D, Topics 11-15 discuss the following chapter 33 processing screens:  Topic 11: Entitlement and Kickers Screen, Topic 12: Enrollment Screen, Topic 13: Letter Information Screen, Topic 14: Work Product Summary Screen, and Topic 15: Payment Instructions Screen.
